brand.name: JATO
brand.tone: Premium dark fintech, trusted institutional, fast, high-end.

typography.description: Using Satoshi for bold, premium headings (breaking the Inter-everywhere rule for tension) and Inter for high legibility body text as requested. Tracking must be tight (-0.02em to -0.04em) on headings.

colors.rules: No pure white backgrounds. Use subtle blue glow via Box Shadows on primary elements. Hover states must have higher contrast (e.g., hover:bg-[#004BE6] for primary button). Never use full-screen gradients.

surfaces.name: Glassmorphism Cards
surfaces.description: Background #0F1629 at 80% opacity, heavy backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-xl), 1px solid border of border-white/10. For fintech, don't refract too much—keep data readable.

surfaces.name: The Tracing Beam (Linear-style)
surfaces.description: Subtle glowing borders for pricing or high-conversion cards. A moving gradient background in a 1px border mask.

surfaces.name: Subtle Blue Glow
surfaces.description: Use drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,87,255,0.3)] for critical JATO primary elements like the Fund button or main balance.

visual_enhancers.motion: Fast, polished motion mimicking Linear. Crisp transitions, command-style menus, tap-activated contextual actions. Hover states on cards should have a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and enhanced border glow.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) in Duotone weight for a high-end fintech feel. Very clean, technical aesthetic.

layout_spacing.grid: Command-room grid. Dense but organized. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Mobile-first responsive grids.
layout_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard p-4, p-6, p-8. Cards must have p-6 or p-8 internal padding.
layout_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-aligned content for numbers/densest areas. Center hero.

components_instructions.name: Navigation / Header
components_instructions.usage: Sticky header (z-50) with glassmorphism backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#080C16]/80. JATO bold wordmark logo. Primary CTA 'Sign Up' or 'Dashboard'.

components_instructions.name: Dashboard Cards
components_instructions.usage: Shadcn cards heavily customized. bg-[#0F1629] backdrop-blur-md border-white/10 rounded-2xl. No heavy drop shadows, use inner borders. Main USDC balance should be massive (text-5xl) with tight tracking.

components_instructions.name: JATO Card Mockup
components_instructions.usage: A physical card representation in the UI. Dark card (#0F1629 to #080C16 gradient), subtle noise texture, electric blue edges, Visa logo in corner. Glassmorphic overlay.

components_instructions.name: Transaction History
components_instructions.usage: Dense list. Left-align. Avatar/Icon left, Name/Date middle, Amount right. Amounts in text-[#00E5A0] for success/incoming, white for outgoing. Filter tabs (Linear style, segmented control).

components_instructions.name: Fund / PIX Screen
components_instructions.usage: Large keypad input for BRL, live conversion to USDC below it. Prominent 'Fund with PIX' button with #00E5A0 accent.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure #8A9CC2 on #080C16 passes 4.5:1. Primary text is #FFFFFF.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='fund-pix-button', data-testid='signup-submit-button').

image_urls.description: Reference for Visa card mockups if realistic textures are needed.
User profile avatar for Dashboard and Settings screens.

media.icons_strategy: Use Phosphor Icons (QrCode or Bank icon) for PIX. For Visa, use a stylized text 'VISA' or an SVG path. Do not use generic placeholders.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the mobile-first hybrid approach. Build React JS web screens designed to mimic a premium mobile app. Use Shadcn UI primitives and Tailwind CSS. Strict adherence to background #080C16 and cards #0F1629. Implement 'Phantom Wallet meets Linear' styling: clean, zero clutter, high contrast, crisp 1px borders, subtle blue glows (#0057FF) on key actions, green (#00E5A0) for success/positive amounts. Add data-testid to every button, input, and interactive element. Ensure the live rate ticker ('1 USDC = R$ 5.42') is visually distinct (e.g., monospace font or pill badge).
